release.action:
• Added documentation for standardized project folder modeling across sources, resources, tests, and documentation directories.
  • Documented built-in layout definitions for Maven, Gradle, JavaScript, Python, and default project structures.
  • Added guidance for resolving layout paths relative to a project base directory and deriving layout metadata from project files such as pom.xml.

Fixes:
  • Fixed multi MCP server handling in addMcpServer().
  • Resolved Sonar-reported issues to improve code quality and maintainability.
Refactoring:
  • Renamed ProcessTerminationException to TaskTerminationException.
  • Updated recursive file lookup to use ProjectLayout.findFiles(directory) in the functional tool implementation.
Chores:
  • Added ProjectLayout.getExcludeDirs() to final and system instructions, including .machai in the excluded directories list.
  • Added automated tests and refreshed release notes for version 1.1.8.

Fixes:
  • Improved episode template prompt handling for user input.
  • Standardized log messages by using backticks instead of single quotes.

Features:
  • Added dedicated embedding provider abstraction and manager lookup.
  • Added dedicated embedding provider usage in Picker and removed schema function tool.
  • Added instructions and model parameter handling in ActMojo.
  • Enhanced readLine method to support multi-line input with line breaker and user signature.
  • Added dependencies for HTML parsing and text processing utilities.
Fixes:
  • Fixed a variable name.
  • Fixed classification JSON detection in Picker and updated embedding model provider prefix in assembly act.
  • Added fallback to System.out.print for null console and model logging in Ghostwriter.
  • Added null checks to prevent overwriting instructions and model properties in ActProcessor.
  • Added EmbeddingProvider type validation before instantiation in GenaiProviderManager.
Refactoring:
  • Refactored embedding support across OpenAI and CodeMie providers.
  • Refactored CodeMieProvider to use named inner classes for provider extensions and fixed missing return statement in embedding method.
  • Refactored provider initialization to pass model name as explicit parameter instead of through configuration.
  • Refactored bindex act to use multi-step inputs with dedicated javadoc generation.
  • Refactored maven-javadoc-plugin configuration from reporting to pluginManagement section.
  • Removed unused listFilesRecursively method and fixed unchecked cast warning in ProjectContextFunctionTools.
  • Removed unused imports from CodeMieProvider and BindexFunctionTools.
  • Removed unused dependencies from pom.xml.
